_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your family. config.json is gitignored. The reasoning model is configured in OpenClaw, not here — Homebase is model-agnostic and works with whichever model OpenClaw is set to.

location._comment: Used for weather lookups (Open-Meteo, no key required) and timezone-aware scheduling.

whatsapp._comment: group_id is the WhatsApp group ID where the daily briefing is sent. Find it in the OpenClaw WhatsApp bridge logs (looks like 1234567890@g.us). agent_number is the phone the bridge sends from.

calendar._comment: id is the Google Calendar ID (looks like ...@group.calendar.google.com or 'primary'). primary_email_id is your personal Gmail used to filter out personal calendar events from the family briefing.
calendar.name: Family Calendar

family._comment: members is a list of {name, phone}; both formats (list and phone-keyed dict) are accepted. kids has per-child meal rules and an emoji ('boy'/'girl' map to 👦/👧, anything else to 🧒).

kids.name: Kid 1
meal_rules: Breakfast: Scrambled eggs, oats, jam toast
NO egg items at lunch if had eggs for breakfast

kids.name: Kid 2
meal_rules: Breakfast: Soft oats, mashed banana, soft toast
All food must be soft — limited teeth

stores._comment: Used by the shopping list to group items by store. Add as many keys as you want; the morning briefing knows about indian/bulk/general but the shopping list will route to any key here.

school._comment: email_domains and email_addresses build the Gmail search query for the school email monitor.
school.name: School Name

briefing._comment: Time the morning briefing fires (24h). weather and positive_message are feature flags.
